# Test Data Fixtures

This directory contains **synthetic test data only**.

## Rules

- ✅ Fake vendor names
- ✅ Fake locations
- ✅ Round numbers
- ✅ Past tax years only
- ❌ No real SSNs
- ❌ No real EINs
- ❌ No real addresses
- ❌ No real account numbers

## Files

- `sample-chase-2025.csv` - Example Chase bank export
- `sample-amex-2025.csv` - Example Amex export

## Generating New Fixtures

If you need more test data, create it manually with fake information.
Never use real statements, even with amounts changed.
